stemHtml: A performance class A twin engined aeroplane is stabilised on final approach at a calibrated airspeed equal to VMCL. The critical engine fails. Maintaining aeroplane control by the pilot will…

options.a: Be possible during the approach, but NOT during a potential go-around.
options.b: NOT be possible, unless the pilot increases the speed by 5 knots.
options.c: Be possible during both the approach and a potential go-around.
